channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California requires proof of gayness for utility contracts but not ID to vote
item.description: California businesses must undergo a gay-certification process to qualify for contracts reserved for gay-owned firms, according to Christopher Rufo.

item.title: Trump's Swift and Complete Humiliation
item.description: The president abandoned his earlier stances and adopted Iran's position on all major disputes leading into the war.

item.title: Senators threaten Hegseth's travel budget to get disclosures about military strikes
item.description: A provision in the Senate's annual National Defense Authorization Act would withhold 75% of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's travel budget...

item.title: Court agrees Trump team can rewrite slavery exhibits at Independence Park in Philadelphia
item.description: A federal appeals court on Thursday granted the Trump administration permission to replace exhibits at Independence National Historical Park...
